<Note>
  **Under construction.** White-label wallet documentation is being written. Check back soon or contact us if you need early access.
</Note>

The white-label wallet is the optional end-user surface — a customer-facing wallet you ship under your own brand, configured from the [Console](/build/console). Each end user is provisioned a per-user embedded EVM wallet automatically on first login, with no seed phrases or recovery flows to manage.

<Note>
  Ryle is a technology provider, not a custodian. Wallet keys are held by the embedded-wallet provider (e.g. Privy), not by Ryle.
</Note>

## What it surfaces

- End-user confidential wallets and [confidential payments](/products/confidential-payments).
- [Accounts & wallets](/products/accounts-and-wallets) for your customers.
- Branding, onboarding methods, and feature toggles set from the Console.
